name: Tour Privado Ámsterdam Auténtico: Jordaan - Ana Frank y Vondelpark
description:
Siéntete como un auténtico Amsterdammer
La diferencia entre visitar una ciudad y vivirla está en que te la enseñemos los que la conocemos. En este tour descubriremos lo más genuino de Ámsterdam: canales, casas barco, fachadas inclinadas, bicicletas, Ana Frank… Te suena, ¿verdad? Hablaremos del pasado y del presente para que tengas una visión 360 de todo lo ocurrido en esta ciudad tan emblemática. Además, aprovechando que vamos solos, podrás tomarte el tiempo que necesites en cada lugar. ¡Tú ve preparando la cámara!

Qué está incluido

Guía especializado (y muy simpático) de habla hispana.

Itinerario

01.
Anillo de canales
Caminar a la orilla del Distrito de los Canales, Patrimonio Mundial de la UNESCO, es algo tan maravilloso que se convierte en una experiencia inolvidable, y más si nos vamos fijando en el interior de los palacetes de sus habitantes. Es que los holandeses no suelen utilizar cortinas. ¡Pero ojo! Hay que respetar siempre su intimidad.

02.
El Jordaan

name: De Utrecht a Gouda: Aventura y Tradición Quesera
description:
¡Descubre la esencia de las ciudades más encantadoras de los Países Bajos en un solo día!

Acompáñanos en esta excursión desde Ámsterdam a Utrecht y Gouda, dos joyas históricas con identidad propia. Pasea por los románticos canales de Utrecht, con sus exclusivas terrazas a nivel del agua, y déjate maravillar por su impresionante Torre Dom, la más alta del país. Con nuestro guía local, explorarás el corazón medieval de la ciudad y conocerás su vibrante historia y arquitectura.

Después, pondremos rumbo a Gouda, mundialmente conocida por su famoso queso. Aquí disfrutarás de una visita guiada por su encantador centro histórico, incluyendo la emblemática Plaza del Mercado, el precioso ayuntamiento gótico y la iglesia de San Juan, famosa por sus vidrieras.

Durante la excursión, también tendrás la oportunidad de visitar el tradicional mercado del queso de Gouda, donde los productores locales presentan sus ruedas de queso al estilo tradicional, ¡una experiencia única y autén
highlights: Visita guiada a pie por Utrecht.

name: Amsterdam Luxury German Canal Cruise
description:
Explore Amsterdam on a German-Guided Canal Cruise

Discover Amsterdam from the water during this relaxed 1-hour canal cruise with a German-speaking guide. Sit back on a comfortable, 100% electric boat and enjoy the city’s iconic canals while listening to engaging stories in your own language.

Cruise through the UNESCO-listed canal belt, past the charming Jordaan district, the elegant Golden Bend, the romantic Magere Brug, and along the Amstel River. Depending on the route, you may also pass landmarks such as the Anne Frank House and the Seven Bridges view.

Your experienced German-speaking host shares insights into Amsterdam’s history, culture, and everyday life. From the city’s Golden Age to modern traditions. Clear explanations, interesting background stories, and local tips ensure you fully understand what you see.

name: Private Walking Tour of Amsterdam
description:
Private Walking Tour of Amsterdam

Our tour of the Amsterdam old town begins at your hotel, and over three hours we'll see the most emblematic sights in the Dutch capital, such as the famous flower market, or Dam Square, the beating heart of the city itself.

The tour takes in key sights in the history of not only the city, but sights of global significance such as Ann Frank's House, and the Dutch East India Company headquarters, learning about the impact of the Second World War on the city, already a major power following its capture of merchant trading routes in the seventeenth and eighteenth centuries.

This is, of course, a private tour, so you decide the exact itinerary.

We pick you up at your Hotel in the center of Amsterdam.

It is the perfect experience to immerse yourself in Dutch culture, history and local life while enjoying beautiful landscapes, unique architecture and delicious regional products.

name: School Group Amsterdam's Urban Adventure Bike Tour
description:
Experience Amsterdam's urban and alternative side as we take your students on a unique tour of the city's lesser-known places.

Join our guide for an offbeat bike adventure, where we uncover hidden gems, street art, and architectural marvels, both old and new. The group will be immersed in Amsterdam's vibrant biking culture and thriving alternative art scene on this tour designed for a fun group experience. Together on our bikes, we'll venture into the famous Western part of the city. An intriguing neighbourhood that combines the charm of a hipster 19th-century district with a modern twist. From there, we'll delve into the Jordaan, an enchanting area with a rich working-class history. Speaking of delving, whilst in this area, the group will have the chance to try out some magnet fishing in one of Amsterdam's canals. Who knows what we will find?!

SHIPYARDS, GRAFFITI & STREET ART

name: Combo: Rijksmuseum + Van Gogh Museum Guided Tour - Private (ENGLISH)
description:
Discover Amsterdam’s two most celebrated museums on this 5.5-hour, private tour. Begin your journey at the Rijksmuseum, home to the Dutch Golden Age’s greatest treasures, then continue to the Van Gogh Museum to trace the life and artistry of one of the world’s most beloved painters. Led by an expert guide, this experience offers an unparalleled look into the evolution of Dutch art.

At the Rijksmuseum, admire Rembrandt’s dramatic The Night Watch and the luminous beauty of Vermeer’s The Milkmaid. Discover the extraordinary detail of 17th-century still lifes, striking portraits, and historical artifacts that capture the spirit of the Golden Age. Your guide will reveal the stories behind these masterpieces, bringing their techniques, influences, and historical significance to life.

After a break for lunch, step into the world of Vincent van Gogh at the Van Gogh Museum. Follow his artistic evolution from the dark, emotive T
highlights:
The Milkmaid by Johannes Vermeer
Admire Vermeer’s luminous depiction of a simple domestic scene, where meticulous detail and radiant light transform an ordinary moment into a timeless masterpiece.

Sunflowers
Stand before one of Van Gogh’s most iconic masterpieces, where vibrant yellows and thick, dynamic brushstrokes capture the energy and warmth of his time in Arles.

The Bedroom
Step into Van Gogh’s world with The Bedroom, a tranquil yet emotionally charged depiction of his living space in Arles, famous for its distorted perspective and innovative color choices.

The Potato Eaters
Considered Van Gogh’s first masterpiece, this dark, raw depiction of peasants sharing a meal contrasts sharply with his later vibrant works, highlighting his artistic evolution.

name: Excursión Privada Molinos Zaanse Schans y Gran Dique
description:
“Dios creó el mundo y los holandeses, Países Bajos”

Si has leído algo sobre Holanda, sabrás ya que no se trata de un país normal, ¿verdad? Parte de su territorio se encuentra por debajo del nivel del mar y su historia siempre ha estado marcada por una eterna batalla contra su peor enemigo: el agua. Te proponemos conocer con nosotros dos de los elementos más importantes de este país que han hecho que sea tal y como lo conocemos hoy. ¡Sí! Este tour va de molinos y diques.

Conoce de la mano de un guía experto dos de los mayores logros de la historia de Los Países Bajos: los molinos de Zaanse Schans y el Gran Dique Afsluitdijk.

Comenzaremos dirigiéndonos al parque de los molinos de viento Zaanse Schans, motor económico del país entre los siglos XVI y XVIII, ya que los holandeses aprovecharon la fuerza del viento para moler las es

name: Amsterdam's Urban Adventure: Bike Tour of the Hidden Gems of the City
description:
Distance

12 km (8 miles)

About

Amsterdam’s Urban Adventure

Amsterdam is famous for its biking culture and alternative art scene. During this fun 3 hour bike tour you’ll experience these in a relaxed group setting, with a few extra surprises along the way. With your local guide you’ll go on an Urban Adventure through parts of Amsterdam the average tourist doesn’t see. Passing by beautiful canal houses, colourful street-art, unique architecture (both old and new), centuries old industrial zones and former shipyards - you’ll discover some of the hidden urban gems of Amsterdam.

This bike tour starts near Central Station, which is ideal if you are using public transport as all of the main transport methods have stops there. Once you've been fitted out with a traditional Dutch bike, we will pedal across to the Western part of the city exploring the 17th Century harbour area of Prinseneiland and the working class neighbourhood of Jordaan. Both of these areas have changed dramatically over the last few decades as the hipsters

name: Free Tour Ámsterdam Auténtico: Jordaan, Ana Frank y Beguinario
description:
Conozcamos Ámsterdam al detalle
Como si nos metiéramos en una máquina del tiempo, el paraguas verde nos transportará al pasado para conocer al detalle cómo vivían los holandeses desde el siglo XVII y durante toda la ampliación que sufrió la ciudad en los siglos posteriores. ¡Pero ojito! No podemos olvidarnos del presente, y por eso, veremos juntos que se cuece en esta ciudad a día de hoy. Una visión 360º de todo lo que ha pasado en esta ciudad única. Nuestros guías saben mucho de todo esto, así que no se quedará ningún secreto por descubrir.

Los grupos no superarán las 15 personas, y al ser tan reducidos podrás andar con facilidad por las calles y rodear los canales, además de resolver todas nuestras dudas.

Aunque la reserva para este tour es gratuita, al finalizar eres tú mismo quién valora el trabajo de los guías con una remuneración económica que tiene que ser tan buena como el tour que te han hecho. Aquí no hay trampa ni cartón.

name: Private Amsterdams City Highlights & Hidden Gems Walking Tour
description:
Are you short on time but still want to get a sense of what Amsterdam is all about? This is a private tour for you. In this intriguing walking tour, we share our quirkiest stories, the interesting history of Amsterdam, and some of the city’s most iconic places. The city's most famous highlights and hidden gems.

Canal District, Dam Square, Jordaan and more
If possible we pick you up from your hotel to walk into the old city centre. We will stroll through the quaint streets of the canal district. Visit the heart of the city at the famous Dam Square and get lost in the old working-class area of Jordaan.

From there we make our way through the more quiet streets to the river Amstel. We continue to the Magere Brug (The Bridge of Love) with lovely views of the Amsterdam boat scene.

We will pass the Jewish Quarter and end in the oldest part of town nearby Nieuwmarkt and the famous Red Light district (up to 4 people).

More info

Weather, route
The definite route depends on the weather, time, your wishes and how many stops we will do.

Our guides start their day with a sun dance, but in case of rain, please bring an umbrella and poncho so we can still enjoy the tour. Also, a good meal before the tour will make it a lot more enjoyable!

What's included

Private Guide

What's not included

Souvenirs and gratuites

Entry/Admission - Westerkerk

Pricing
Cancellations
highlights: Private Guide
Souvenirs and gratuites
Entry/Admission - Westerkerk

name: Bikes, Beers, & Bites
description:
When in Rome…. er Amsterdam!

When you arrive in Amsterdam you're immediately intoxicated by all the bikes, everywhere you look you see locals and tourists alike whipping through the narrow canals and over the quaint bridges. At the same time you're eager to sample some of the traditional local food and drink. This is the perfect tour of all three.

What's included

Equal parts biking, history, and bites/drinks; we’ll grab bikes and head towards one of the independent breweries in town conveniently located near a classic Dutch windmill. We'll have a chance to sample a local brew and grab some tasty snacks. Hoping back on bikes we’ll explore some of the city, stopping for some more food along the way rounding off the whole experience back where we started – conveniently located next to another fantastic Amsterdam brewery.

Cancellations

name: TopDeck's Amsterdam Bike Tour A
description:
As you ride with our guide on our TopDeck Amsterdam Bike Tour you will discover the highlights of the city on a fun 2 hour bike ride. Be ready for some cycling and a lot of laughs.

Over the course of 2 hours we’ll take you through some of the most beautiful streets of Amsterdam. We’ll encounter many of the highlights of the city, including the Anne Frank House, Rijksmuseum, and an old city gate, as we pass over picturesque canals and drawbridges. Whilst you cycle, you'll hear all about Amsterdam's rich and diverse history as well as the quirks and peculiarities that make up Amsterdam's culture and society.

Along with the history, you'll hear the personal stories, observations, and opinions of your local guide. All of our guides are personable, knowledgeable, and above all, fun!

We always have your safety in mind, so you can enjoy your bike ride responsibly.

Highlights
Ride along Amsterdam's Canals
Cross historic drawbridges through the city centre
Pass beautiful canal houses
Go through the lovely, green Vondelpark
Cycle under the Rijksmuseum, The Netherlands national art -museum through an amazing tunnel,
See a centuries-old city gate just outside the Red Light District
Cancellations

name: Poffertjes tour, inclusief verse poffertjes bereid aan boord en drankjes
description:
Stap aan boord voor een heerlijk Hollandse ervaring op het water! Tijdens onze Poffertjes Boottocht geniet je van een ontspannen vaartocht van 90 minuten, gecombineerd met een warme portie versgebakken poffertjes – live bereid aan boord. Drankjes zijn inbegrepen, dus leun achterover, proef en geniet van het uitzicht.

Wat is erbij inbegrepen

-Verse poffertjes, live gebakken aan boord
-Klassieke toppings
-Drankjes inbegrepen (frisdrank, bier, wijn, koffie/thee)
-Live gids aan boord met leuke weetjes en verhalen
-90 minuten varen langs unieke highlights

Wat is niet inbegrepen

Niet rolstoeltoegankelijk
Geen toilet aan boord

Routebeschrijving

📍 Red Light District (De Wallen)
Het oudste deel van Amsterdam, bekend om zijn rosse buurt, smalle straatjes, neonverlichting en historische gebouwen. Naast de raamprostitutie vind je hier ook hippe bars, kunstgalerieën en charmante grachten.

📍 Oude Kerk (Old Church)
Gebouwd in 1306, midden in het Red Light District. De oudste kerk van Amsterdam met een indrukwekkend gotisch interieur. Tegenwoordig ook gebruikt voor moderne kunstinstallaties en exposities.

📍 Scheepvaartmuseum (Maritime Museum)
Museum over de maritieme geschiedenis van Nederland. Je vindt er kaarten, scheepsmodellen en een VOC-schip dat

name: Jewish History Tour - Private Tour
description:
Explore the Jewish history of Amsterdam dating back to the 16th century, learn about the impact of the Jewish community on the development of the city, and join a tour that offers a deeper and more meaningful experience than a standard tourist activity.

This private tour takes you to key historic sites and monuments connected to Jewish history in the Netherlands and Amsterdam. Visit the Portuguese Synagogue, the Holocaust Names Monument, and several World War II points of interest. Gain a thorough understanding of World War II, the Dutch Resistance, the pre-war period, and the significant influence of the Jewish community on Dutch society.

What's included

-Private guide
-Tickets for the Portuguese Synagogue
-Free pick up and drop off within 15 minutes walking distance of the H'Art Museum Amsterdam (meeting point)

Cancellations

name: Private Original Brews & Tales - Amsterdam Craft Beer Tour
description:
Discover the Tastiest Craft Beers in Amsterdam!
Are you ready to dive into the world of award-winning and distinctive craft beers from some of the Netherlands' top microbreweries?
This isn’t just beer you can pick up anywhere, this is a journey through the heart of the Netherland’s craft beer scene, where every sip tells a story

Sip, Savour, and Explore:
The Ultimate Craft Beer Adventure in Amsterdam!
Thirsty for adventure? Get ready to embark on a delicious journey through Amsterdam’s craft beer wonderland! We’re talking about sipping on liquid gold from the finest microbreweries in the Netherlands, beers so unique and tasty, they’ll make your taste buds dance in delight.

Hoppy, Happy, and Ready to Discover?
Whether you’re a hops enthusiast, a stout lover, or just dipping your toes into the beer world, we’ve got the perfect brew for you. From IPAs that pack a punch to Trappist ales that are the stuff of legend, this tour is your ticket to beer bliss. Expect bold and subtle flavours, award-winning brews, and a whole lot of “Hops hops hurray!”

Craft Beer, Cozy Vibes, and a Dash of Dutch Charm
But wait, there’s more! This isn’t just about the beer (though it’s a pretty big part). As we stroll through Amsterdam’s charming old town, we’ll pop into legendary bars that have been pouring th
highlights: *4 tastings of awesome local craft beers (some have won awards!)
*1 local spirit
Delicious Dutch snacks
Lots of great tips for you to get the Amsterdam Experience - food and drinks, interesting things to do, etc

description:
Stap aan boord bij één van onze luxe overdekte boten en geniet van de spannende historische tocht door de grachten van Amsterdam.

Voor het grootste gedeelte van de tour kan je genieten van hoe Amsterdam vandaag de dag eruit ziet terwijl je kan luisteren naar de audiotour (Nederlands of Engels).

Bij 7 locaties zet je een VR bril op die je directe omgeving laat zien maar 400 jaar geleden tijdens de 17e eeuw. Bezoekers krijgen te zien:

name: (Exclusive) Diamond City Tour
description:
Your guests will Discover the many facets of one of Amsterdam’s most brilliant industries.
About

From monarchs to starlets and from firebrands to craftsmen, you can chart Amsterdam’s history through its most precious stone. Explore this unique city through its diamond connections. Some of the stories are scandalous and fun. Some are inspiring and thoughtful. All are engaging while showing a new side of Amsterdam.

The walking tour through central Amsterdam ends with a VIP experience at the Gassan Diamond Factory, including a factory tour and a champagne-filled exploration of modern jewelry.

Our guide will stay with your guests throughout the experience (to ensure they aren't given the hard sell by the diamond factory employee).

Cancellations

name: Private Kinderdijk & Gouda Tour
description: KINDERDIJK In the morning we visit the enchanting windmill hamlet of Kinderdijk to start the day. We will visit two of the famous windmills from the inside and have coffee inside a restaurant nearby. There are a total of 19 windmills, the highest concentration you can find in the Netherlands. You will get the chance to enjoy the windmills from the water and the land. GOUDA Gouda, the historic city in the province of South Holland, is known worldwide for its Gouda cheese, its candles, and delicious stroopwafels. Yet Gouda has much more to offer than that alone. We will take you to see some of the most beautiful parts of this historic city with its medieval city centre. In a walking tour, we will show you Gouda’s ancient canals and several splendid monuments, such as the Sint Janskerk. The Sint Janskerk is the longest church in the Netherlands, famous for its Gouda windows. Another must-see is the old City Hall, a beautiful monument dating back to 1450. We will see the carillon, whose mechanical dolls come to life to put on a wonderful show. Of course, when visiting Gouda we need to taste the best Gouda cheeses and Siroopwafels.. We will visit the cheese museum and sample some delicious cheese, also the Siroopwafel factory. Here you get to see the production line in action and taste the freshest waffle befor

name: Tour Privado Barrio Rojo
description:
Descubre el Barrio Rojo a tu manera
No te resistas a descubrir los secretos que esconde esta conocidísima zona de Ámsterdam a tu ritmo. Caminaremos entre baldosas medievales y rincones carmesí para conocer el barrio de las luces rojas, en el que la libertad se abandera de la ciudad. Si quieres conocer todo lo que ocultan esos ladrillos, nos ofrecemos voluntarios a acompañarte y mostrarte todos sus secretos. Solo falta que nos digas fecha, hora y lugar, que allí estaremos.

A través de una visita privada a pie, descubriremos la zona más antigua de la ciudad de la mano de uno de nuestros guías hispanohablantes residentes en Ámsterdam. name: Private Day Trip to Rotterdam, The Hague and Delft
description:
The three pearls of the South Holland
Sometimes, even we are surprised that the Netherlands keeps so many treasures in such a small space. And there are cities here for all tastes! You’ll be amazed by the breakout architecture of Rotterdam. The story between the royal Orange family and Delft will hook you up. The palaces and gardens of The Hague will leave you speechless. However, always conforming to you, you set the pace.

He knows these three cities in the province of South Holland with the help of an expert guide. We will start by going to the city of Rotterdam, in which we will make a panoramic visit, also making some stops to see places like the Markthal, the Church of San Lorenzo or the famous Cube Houses.

description:

Visit the iconic windmills, witness traditional wooden shoemaking and Dutch cheesemaking, and savor cheese tasting at Zaanse Schans. Enjoy a delightful canal cruise and a captivating walking tour in the picturesque village of Giethoorn.

This tour will take place rain or shine

Brace yourself for an adventure filled with picturesque windmills, traditional fishing villages, and the serene beauty of Giethoorn, often referred to as the “Venice of the North.” Let’s delve into the highlights of this extraordinary tour and uncover the hidden gems that await.

name: Zaanse Schans E-Bike Tour
description:
Cycle back in time and discover a village full of windmills
Duration:

5.5 Hours

Distance

40 km (25 miles)
So we need you to have some experience on a bike :-)
Minimum height for the E-bike is 150cm or 5'

About

On this full day e-bike tour, you’ll take a ferry across the River IJ. Riding over dikes and along canals you'll make your way through the incredible countryside to the north of Amsterdam. Cycling beneath the endless Dutch skies, made famous by the great artists, you'll pass by rows of neat little houses all painted in green. Your guide will tell you why these pretty houses are a common feature in this area.

Making your way towards Zaandam, you will discover the famous InnTel hotel and make a stop to create your own Instagrammable moment. Then it's time to continue the journey northwards.

As you approach Zaanse Schans, you will have your very own wow moment as you get your first glimpse of the chain of windmills from across the water.

Once inside the heritage village you will have time to explore the a

description:

name: Cruise & Jazz door de grachten in overdekte boot met live muziek inclusief drankjes
description:
Ervaar de magie van Amsterdam vanaf het water tijdens onze exclusieve Jazz Canal Cruise – een 1 uur durende vaartocht langs de sfeervolle grachten, begeleid door live jazzmuziek van opkomende Amsterdamse muzikanten.

Laat je meevoeren door de underground jazzscene van de stad terwijl de zon langzaam ondergaat en de lichten van de stad reflecteren op het water. Dit is geen gewone rondvaart – dit is jouw stijlvolle start van de avond.

🎫 Boek nu jouw plek aan boord van deze unieke jazz cruise – een onvergetelijke ervaring voor muziekliefhebbers, romantici en iedereen die op zoek is naar iets bijzonders in Amsterdam.

We will visit 3 bars/pubs with iconic beers and iconic stories. Beer and Amsterdam go hand in hand, and much further than just Heineken. You will learn all about the importance of beer while enjoying the drinking of one. We have hand picked the pubs based on their history and quality of beer. Around the halfway point we will also stop to have a traditional Dutch snack in the most traditional way!

name: Free Tour Ámsterdam
description:
El mejor tour para empezar a conocer Ámsterdam
Seguimos el paraguas verde desde la Estación Central a la Plaza Dam, el De Waag o al Antiguo Barrio Judío (además de a muchos otros sitios). Conoce las zonas más emblemáticas de Ámsterdam de la mano de nuestros guías hispanohablantes. No hay mejor forma de establecer un primer contacto con Ámsterdam que hacerlo de manos de uno de nuestros guías para tomar conciencia de lo especial que es la ciudad en la que te encuentras. Los grupos no superarán las 15 personas, y al ser tan reducidos podrás responder a toooodas tus dudas.

Aunque la reserva para este tour es gratuita, al finalizar eres tú mismo quién valora el trabajo de los guías con una remuneración económica que tiene que ser tan buena como el tour que te han hecho. Aquí no hay trampa ni cartón.

Cuando termines este recorrido te decimos, con total seguridad, que podrás catalogarla como única en el mundo.

Qué está incluido
G
highlights: Guía especializado (y muy simpático) de habla hispana.

name: Excursión Privada Giethoorn
description:
Duración

9 Horas

Acerca

¿Sabías que Giethoorn no tiene carreteras? Sus habitantes se desplazan en barco por los canales, por eso esta localidad neerlandesa también es conocida como la “Venecia verde”.

Saliendo desde​ Á​msterdam, atravesaremos la provincia de Flevoland y el Parque Nacional Weerriben - Wieden hasta llegar a Giethoorn. Allí disfrutaremos de un paseo en barco de 1 hora para contemplar la belleza y magia del lugar, las antiguas granjas con techos de paja y los puentes de madera. También tendremos tiempo libre para hacer fotos, pasear tranquilamente y llenar el estómago en uno de sus excelentes restaurantes (el almuerzo no está incluido).
De camino a Enkhuizen pararemos en el puerto de Lelystad para contemplar la réplica del “Batavia”(galeón del siglo XVII de la Compañía Holandesa de las Indias Orientales) y la famosa estatua “Exposure”, de Antony Gormley.

Cruzaremos de Flevoland a Holanda del Norte por el “Houtribdijk”, dique que comunica ambas provincias y que divide los lagos Ijsselmeer y Markermeer.
Por último, visitaremos Enkhuizen, ciudad clave en la Edad de

name: Tour Museo Van Gogh
description:
Pon la oreja… de Van Gogh
La ciudad de Ámsterdam tiende, inevitablemente, a asociarse con la figura de Vincent Van Gogh. El museo que lleva su nombre alberga la mayor colección del mundo de obras del artista pelirrojo.

Su genialidad no la ponemos en duda, pero todos admiramos a alguien, y Van Gogh ponía sus ojos sobre Rembrandt y Millet, que le llevaron a convertirse en el rey del postimpresionismo.

Con nuestra visita al Museo, no perdemos tiempo en la cola y, como se hace en viernes, y los viernes siempre son buenos, al acabar la visita tendréis 2 horas adicionales para visitar vuestros rincones favoritos, ya que el museo cierra más tarde ese día.

Qué está incluido

Entrada al museo, más un guía hispanohablante.

Itinerario

01.
El pintor se hace en casa
La familia Van Gogh era bastante peculiar, y nuestro Vincent nunca estuvo muy unido a su padre. Pero, por el contrario, con su hermano Teo siempre tuvo una conexión muy especial. Él se encargaba de vender sus

name: Visita Panorámica Privada Ámsterdam
description:
Un tour que va a ir “sobre ruedas”
Vamos a aprovechar al máximo el tiempo para que veas todas las caras de Ámsterdam. Te preguntarás, ¿y cómo es eso posible en 3 horas? Pues muy fácil, porque aunque lo que se lleva aquí es la bici, esta vez vamos a prender los motores y te llevaremos en uno de nuestros vehículos. ¡Ojo! que aquí mandas tú. Si te apetece estirar las piernas, paseamos, y si prefieres reponer fuerzas, nosotros conducimos. Esta es la ruta que te proponemos, pero ya sabes que los camaleones nos adaptamos a lo que sea.

Con este tour privado conoceremos a fondo las zonas con más encanto y emblemáticas de Ámsterdam. De la mano de uno de nuestros guías expertos, hablaremos del pasado y del presente de la ciudad, tratando de obtener la visión más completa posible de la que es una las capitales más bellas de Europa.

Qué está incluido

Recogida en el hotel, guía y conductor privado

name: Rijksmuseum: Cruise, Unlimited Drinks & Bites
description:
Discover the magic of Amsterdam’s UNESCO-listed canals on an extended 90-minute small-group cruise. While standard tours often rush through the city, our 1.5-hour route allows you to truly relax and take in the iconic views without feeling hurried.

An Authentic Open-Air Experience
Escape the crowded mass-tourism boats. We welcome a maximum of 24 guests aboard our comfortable, 100% electric open boat. Feel the fresh air, connect with the city's vibrant atmosphere, and take clear photos without the glare of dirty glass windows as we cruise past iconic landmarks like the Skinny Bridge, the Dancing Houses, and the oldest church in Amsterdam.

Live Local Storytelling
Your captain isn’t just a driver; they are a passionate local host. Expect a mix of fascinating history, hidden gems, and typical Amsterdam humor that brings the city to life in a way no guidebook can. Expect warmth and great co

description:
Embark on a captivating canal cruise with KINboat, starting from Amsterdam's Central Station. Sail through the city's historic waterways, passing iconic landmarks like the National Maritime Museum, Theater Carré, and the Red Light District. Join us for a one-hour journey through Amsterdam's rich history and picturesque scenery.

About

Begin your Amsterdam adventure in style with KINboat's canal cruise, starting from the bustling hub of Amsterdam's Central Station. Our one-hour tour offers a perfect blend of history, culture, and panoramic views that will leave you spellbound from the moment you step aboard.

As we set sail from Central Station, you'll be immersed in the vibrant energy of Amsterdam's bustling waterfront. Watch as cyclists whiz by and pedestrians go about their day while we navigate the intricate network of canals that crisscross the city. Marvel at the striking architecture of Central Station itself, a magnificent example of late 19th-century design.

description:
Experience Amsterdam in its serene morning glory with KINboat's Morning Cruise. Set sail on the tranquil canals and immerse yourself in the peaceful ambiance of the city awakening. Perfect for those seeking a calm and leisurely start to their day, our morning cruise offers a unique perspective of Amsterdam as a quiet and charming city.

About

name: Queer Heroes for Amsterdam Pride
description:
Get inspired by queer Resistance fighters, spies, creatives and pioneers!

In celebration of 2026 World Pride taking place in Amsterdam, we’re spending every evening reveling in the stories of our community’s heroes while walking through the beautiful canal belt.

Most LGBTQ+ tours – ours included – include stories of violence and homophobia. For Pride 2026, we’ve removed those stories and added more international badasses. We’ve also knocked 25% off our normal price!

So come join us to learn Amsterdam’s rainbow history and head to your next party saying: “We’re queer and we have always been here!”

Traveling Solo?

We have a minimum of 2 people per tour, so if you have trouble finding a single availability at the time you want, you have two options:

Team up with a (new) friend and book two tickets!
Follow us on Instagram or Facebook where we post stories 2 days in advance if we have any openings in a scheduled tour.

Passionate and knowledgeable history storyteller as your guide

What's not included

(Optional) gratuity for your guide

name: Private Cheese Shop Walk
description:
This is NOT just a cheese tasting - it is an entertaining and educational experience!

We will take you to some of the best cheese shops in Europe. There, we will buy four or five very special cheeses for you to enjoy. The cheese selection will vary, depending on the season and what I think is special that day, as well as what will suit you. The cheeses are very different to what tourists normally try in Amsterdam!

We will then walk to a 300 year old Tavern to enjoy the cheeses with 4 very special beers, that pair well with the cheese (or 2 glasses of wine) There you will learn how the different cheeses are made, also, what makes them look, smell and taste different. You will also learn how to choose, travel with and store cheese. Even how best to cut and serve cheese!

Important to Know

• The workshop will finish around near Dam Square
• The talk will be given in English.

What's included

Private Guide

A selection of cheese

4 craft beers (additional beers can be added on the day) or 2 glasses of wine.

What's not included

Souvenirs and gratuites

Additional information
FAQs
Cancellations

name: Tour Diario por la ciudad
description:
En menos de tres horas y sin esfuerzo (¡prometido!), explorarán la mayor parte del centro histórico de la ciudad y mucho más.

En el recorrido haremos muchas paradas y conocerán, tanto lugares conocidos como la Casa de Ana Frank o la Plaza de los Museos, como otros lugares que se les escapan a la mayoría de los turistas de la ciudad, incluido el maravilloso parque Vondelpark (y sus secretos).

Al ser un grupo pequeño y todos hispanohablantes, el intercambio, la charla y las fotos están más que aseguradas!

Y aunque parezca obvio, no lo es tanto: nuestras bicicletas son las más nuevas y cómodas de la ciudad. E importante: tienen frenos de mano.

Contamos con 8 años de experiencia haciendo únicamente los tours en bicicleta en Amsterdam . Nuestra experiencia es excepcional, el trato es muy personalizado. Hay otras empresas, pero ninguna como la nuestra.

Y todo y siempre en español. Sin sorpresas!

¡Les esperamos!

Bicicleta de calidad (con frenos d
highlights: Bicicleta de calidad (con frenos de mano y tres velocidades)

name: EN: Daytrip to Zaanse Schans
description:
Discover the most iconic symbols of the Netherlands!
You know that photo you absolutely have to take when you travel somewhere Well, that’s it you haven’t really been to the Netherlands if you don’t have a picture with its famous windmills in the background. This tour is short but intense, designed so you can make the most of your time. In just one afternoon you’ll see different types of windmills, learn how traditional wooden clogs are made, and enjoy a tasting of delicious Dutch cheese. Sounds like a great plan, right?

This excursion takes place on a private bus, because there’s simply no better way to enjoy an afternoon in the Netherlands.

Qué está incluido

Includes transportation by bus from Amsterdam and a Spanish speaking guide throughout the entire tour.

name: Rembrandt Walk
description:
Walk in the footsteps of Rembrandt in the streets of Amsterdam.
Visit the Rembrandt House Museum with a personal guide, see where his most famous paintings used to hang on the wall; like the Night Watch, the syndics of the Drapers Guild and the Anatomy Lesson of Professor Tulp.

We walk along the houses of Rembrandt's friends, his clientele and the locations linked to Rembrandt’s personal life. This is as close as you can get to the Dutch Master.

• Guided tour along rembrandt related locations and landmarks

name: Private Rijksmuseum Tour, Dutch Masters, Rembrandt & more
description:
Always wanted to see the famous work of the Dutch Masters; Rembrandt, Vermeer, Jan Steen? In this Private Rijkmuseum Tour, our guide provides a personal experience of the Netherlands' most visited art museum.

Discover Rembrandt's Nachtwacht

With a deep knowledge of the displayed art, the guide explains the stories behind the artists and their work in fluent English. We will see Rembrandt’s masterpiece, De Nachtwacht (don’t worry, we will teach you how to pronounce it correctly) and get up close to works from Van Gogh & Steen.

History of Holland
More than just a tour of Dutch masterpieces, in this tour you will learn more about how the art fits into the historical context of the Netherlands. Your guide takes you through the museum to provide the stories behind the paintings that go much deeper than the descriptions on the wall.

You’ll hear quirky stories about the artists, fun facts about their work, and how their work contributed to the Dutch cultural heritage. We will see the inside of a typical 17th-century house, the beautiful library, famous white and blue pottery pieces, and even what naval battles looked like.

This tour is available on two levels:

Highlights of the Museum - Not very familiar with the Dutch art world and just want to visit the Rijksmuseum in a fun and light way? Experience the most famous paintings without too many facts or technical ja
highlights: Tickets to the Rijksmuseum
Your Personal Private Tour Guide

name: Private Amsterdam Bike Tour
description:
Join our Private Amsterdam Bike Tour and explore hidden art and culture by bike in the non-touristy parts of Amsterdam. We will meet you at Mike's Bikes, Oosterdoksstraat 106, 1011 DK Amsterdam and will then take you into the city. You will see beautiful canal houses, drawbridges, street art, old industrial zones and ship docks. The true hidden gems of the city. We go by bike and maybe take a ferry.

With your private guide, you will visit the less touristy places of the city to see the hidden gems of Amsterdam. You don’t have to be an experienced cyclist, we will go over easy roads, so you can get used to the Dutch bike and the traffic.

More info

Cargo Bike or tandem?
We take care of the bicycle for you, we have bicycles for every size. We can also get tandems or a cargo bike if you want to join in with your whole family.

Where are we are going?
The Experience will start at Mike's Bikes close to Central Station, where you will pick up your bike. Then we set out to explore the history, art and culture of Amsterdam in classic Dutch fashion: by bike. We will see old canal houses and modern architecture, will go over a lot of bridges (maybe also a typical Dutch draw bridge) and wander through old neighbourhoods with hidden art and nice places to hang out.

We can also go to some former shipyards from the 17th and 19th centuries. Another option is to take the f

description:
Welcome aboard The Ultimate Amsterdam Canal Cruise!

This is not your typical guided tour with recorded audio in 20 languages. It is designed to be a relaxing yet informative cruise, to soak up the atmosphere of the enchanting Amsterdam Canals, with a drink in hand, to enjoy the waterways as the locals do.

Your captain will show you a fun time as you cruise the city in style, with stories and interesting facts about Amsterdam’s history, culture and various neighbourhoods. There will not be constant narration as we like to also give you time to sit back, relax and enjoy the views and the company of your fellow passengers.

name: Monday Night Laughs: Standup Comedy in English
description:
Kickstart your week at Amsterdam's most iconic comedy show! An unforgettable evening featuring the best of the Dutch comedy scene and big international talent from the US and UK circuits.

We've hosted Netflix's April Macie, Comedy Central's Tom Rhodes, BBC's Ria Lina, and Live at the Apollo's Desiree Burch. No two shows are ever the same — fresh, high-quality comedy every other Monday.

Set in the cozy De Prael microbrewery, this intimate venue is perfect for an authentic comedy night. Come early, enjoy craft beer and great food, then settle in for world-class laughs.

Perfect for date nights, expat meetups, and anyone who wants to start their week with laughter.

'Sup?

This is our regular day-to-day board, no nonsense! Good and stable inflatable SUPS for 1 person. We have a variety of SUP boards available for every level and every weight!

Want to create the ultimate team experience? Have a look at our Group & Events page we have loads to offer!

Do I need lessons or experience?

No, everyone can do it! You only need to be able to swim and have a little sense of balance, but you will get the hang of it in no-time! If not, you can still SUP on your knees and have the same experience or rent a kayak seat. It is just a little less Instagrammable 😉

Contact?

name: Amsterdam Light Festival ✨
description:
Duur: 1.5 - 2 uur
Bezoek jij Amsterdam deze winter? Dan moet je zeker de prachtige kunstwerken zien die de stad verlichten! Deze tour maakt het gemakkelijk en leuk.

Tijdens deze tour

Op een Yellow Bike kun je in slechts een kleine 2 uur in een rustig tempo de kunstwerken ervaren. Onze gids vertelt je de meest interessante verhalen over de kunstwerken en geschiedenis van Amsterdam. Uiteraard laat onze gids je de beste plekjes zien voor prachtige foto’s.

Warme drank inbegrepen!

Gebruik van onze fietsen met belichting, terugtraprem en handrem
Persoonlijke lokale gids
Warme drank onderweg ☕

We fietsen in groepjes van maximaal 12 personen, meestal minder.

Geniet van de Amsterdamse grachten bij avond

Not Just a Bike Tour. Not Just a Food Tour.
It’s a deep-dive into Dutch life with a fork and two wheels.

Embark on a 3 to 3.5-hour culinary journey through Amsterdam, where culture and flavors collide! Our private "Eat Your Bike Out" Food Bike Tour unveils the city's culinary diversity, bike culture, "fight against the water," sustainability projects, and Instagram-worthy landmarks!

name: Private Coffeeshops, Red Light & Old Pub Tour
description:
Red Light, History & Hops – Explore Amsterdam’s Wildest Neighborhood with a Local Guide

Step into the heart of Amsterdam’s most misunderstood district — and come out with surprising stories, a local beer in hand, and a fresh perspective.

This isn’t just about neon lights. On this 2-hour Red Light District walking tour, you’ll explore hidden alleys, centuries-old sailor bars, legendary coffeeshops, and cultural landmarks with a knowledgeable local guide. Along the way, you’ll hear how Amsterdam’s liberal attitude was born — and how this neighborhood evolved from a gritty harbor to a cultural icon.

We finish with a drink at a cozy bar or a craft beer tasting at a local brewery — because history always pairs well with hops.

👥 Group Info:
Small groups (max 12) for a better experience
Private group options available — great for offsites, friends or bachelor/ette groups
Ages 18+ welcome

name: Private Rijksmuseum Tour
description:
Immerse yourself in Dutch art and culture as you explore the Rijksmuseum building and the Gallery of Honour with your private guide. You will have the opportunity to marvel at the finest masterpieces from the Dutch Golden Age. And your guide will share interesting insights and stories about the various works of art.

As the name suggests, the Gallery of Honour showcases the best of the best from the Rijksmuseum’s collection. You’ll see works by famous 17th-century painters such as Rembrandt, Frans Hals, and Vermeer.

One of the highlights of the Rijksmuseum Private Tour is the iconic Night Watch, Rembrandt’s largest and most famous painting.

What's included

-Private Guide
-Rijksmuseum tickets (valid all day)

Cancellations

name: Amsterdam: Burger Cruise with the Burgerbar
description:
Step aboard our Burger Cruise and experience an exceptional dinner: sailing along Amsterdam's famous canals. During this cruise, you will enjoy the Burgerbar's famous hamburgers.
Our skipper and host are happy to welcome you on board. During the cruise, the skipper tells stories about the city in English, in addition, an audio guide is also available in several languages. Drinks are served by the host.

The Burger Cruise is the perfect activity for a fun evening with friends, family or your partner with Amsterdam's iconic sights as a backdrop. The ultimate weekend getaway!

name: Private Coffeeshop & Red Light Tour
description:
Dutch for a day

Join us as we dive into our hippie history and get the insider perspective on Amsterdam's coffeeshop culture!

Our guides are passionate about the fascinating history of getting high in the lowlands. Combined with unique local anecdotes like "What is it like to grow cannabis plants in your mom's garden?", you'll uncover Amsterdam's anarchistic past, hippie history, and the future of tolerance.

And fear not, for we've thought of everything, including satisfying your munchies with delectable Dutch snacks and beverages included in the tour!

Safe and Enjoyable: We prioritize your safety and comfort, ensuring that you can relax and enjoy the tour to the fullest.

Highlights

Expert Local Guide: Immerse yourself in a completely safe atmosphere with our expert local guide who will teach you all about the coffeeshop culture, etiquette, and how we Dutch roll!

Personalized Insights: Learn about Amsterdam's coffeeshop scene from those who know it best, 100% personal and private!

name: Private Canal Tour
description:
Enjoy a 90-minute private boat tour through Amsterdam’s canals and the Amstel River with a personal storyteller from the crew. Hear first‑hand accounts of migration and how immigrants shaped the city, told by crew members with refugee backgrounds from places such as Syria, Somalia, Eritrea, Colombia, Turkey and Egypt. The intimate, single-group format allows space for meaningful interaction and questions while you take in the city’s views from original wooden boats rescued from Lampedusa.

description:
Private 10 Taste Food Tour – Amsterdam’s Flavors, Just for Your Group
Duration

3–4 hours

About

Skip the tourist traps and taste Amsterdam like a local. On this private walking food tour, your group will explore three of the city’s most iconic neighborhoods — Spui, the UNESCO canals, and the Jordaan — while enjoying 10+ tastings at 5+ authentic stops.

Led by your own expert local guide, you’ll dive into the stories behind each bite: from a 200-year-old stroopwafel bakery and a canal-house cheese cellar, to cozy brown cafés and hidden family-run gems. Along the way, you’ll hear centuries of Amsterdam’s history told through food, drinks, and cheeky anecdotes.

Get off the tourist track and onto the water with this laid-back private boat tour through Amsterdam’s canals. Over 90 minutes, you’ll sip cold drinks, enjoy tasty Dutch snacks, and cruise through the prettiest (and quietest) corners of the city — all with your own local skipper and guide.

This unique boat was the favourite boat of famous beer mogul Freddy Heineken, who’s designated seat was at the back booth overseeing this amazing vessel (and its gorgeous canal surroundings). The leather booth seating, adjustable light plan, 2 bars (with Heineken on tap), fully equipped kitchen and (bullet proof) windows that can be fully lowered during a sunny day make this boat a truly distinctive eye catcher on the canals and unforgettable to cruise on.

Groups of up to 36 guests can enjoy a cocktail hour and for a seated dinner there would be sufficient space to accommodate between 24 and 32 guests.

This is not your typical guided tour with recorded audio in 20 languages. It is designed to be a relaxing yet informative cruise, to soak up the atmosphere of the enchanting Amsterdam Canals, with a drink in hand, to enjoy the waterways as the locals do.

Are you turning 30, 40, 50, 60, 70, 46 or 87 and want to do something unique with all your (girl)friends? Or: do you want to surprise a friend who has a celebration? Or: do you want to get on the water with your colleagues? Come for a daytrip to Amsterdam and cruise with canal boat Delphine. Let yourself be pampered! description:
Amsterdam

The best introduction to the most liberal city in the world

	906 Reviewers

About

**Amsterdam's Past, Present and Future - Explained Through Wonderful Storytelling **

Join us on this fresh, complete and immersive introduction to Amsterdam. Discover how a small fishing village transformed into the richest city in the world and how one of the most liberal cities on our planet defines freedom. Find out how 180 nationalities unite in diversity and what it truly means to live here.

You'll learn all that through amazing and relatable storytelling which will help you to truly undertstand all the topics Amsterdam is famous for.

So get ready to dive into the Amsterdam DNA!

Along the way, you'll see the sights and visit the places that matter - the birthplace of Amsterdam Dam Square, UNESCO heritage Canal Belt, the Old City Centre and the iconic Jordaan neighbourhood.

After this experience, you'll never see Amsterdam the same way again.

But most of all…

You'll walk away feeling like an Amsterdam insider, ready to make your experience in Amsterdam one you'll never forget.

Highlights on our itinerary

HIGH CLASS STORYTELLING • DAM SQUARE • OLD HARBOR • THE WORLDS FIRST STOCK EXCHANGE • CENTRAL STATION • SEX WORK & EXPLANATION OF THE RED LIGHT DISTRICT • COFFEESHOPS AND DUTCH DRUG LAWS EXPLAINED

name: Exclusieve Diner Vaartocht
description:
Een luxe dinerervaring op het water van Amsterdam

Beleef een onvergetelijke avond tijdens een exclusief diner aan boord van een klassieke salonboot, terwijl je in alle rust door de sfeervolle grachten van Amsterdam vaart.

Bij aankomst word je verwelkomd met een glas prosecco (ook alcoholvrij verkrijgbaar), waarna je plaatsneemt aan je eigen privétafel bij het raam. Geniet van het prachtige uitzicht op de historische grachtenpanden en charmante bruggen terwijl de stad aan je voorbij glijdt.

Tijdens deze stijlvolle vaartocht van 2 uur en 15 minuten serveren wij een luxe driegangendiner, vers bereid en warm uitgeserveerd aan boord. Om de avond sfeervol te starten, serveren we een tafelgarnituur met lichte hapjes. Voor het voor- en hoofdgerecht kies je uit vis, vlees of een vegetarisch gere

name: Secrets of Amsterdam
description:
Amsterdam is full of surprises and hidden secrets, and in this tour you will see a lot of them. Why is the smallest house right opposite the widest one? What are these bloodstains doing on that building? Why did the people of Amsterdam hate the Central station that much, and what about the weird shape of the hotel opposite? These, and many other secrets, hidden gems, funny stories and interesting sites you would normally not go to are all within a short walk in the stunning center of Amsterdam!

name: KHM Pinnacle - Delightful Dahlias & the Wonderful Windmills of Zaanse Schans Group Tour
description:
From Amsterdam, we will travel to the Tulperij dahlia showgardens in the heart of the Bollenstreek flower growing area of the Netherlands.

Within the show gardens there are over 600 varieties of dahlia in a kaleidescope of colours and shapes.

We will then make our way to a nearby cheese farm for an explanation about making Dutch Gouda cheese and to taste some of the delicious varieties. We will also see a demonstration of clog making by the owner of the farm.

Whilst at the farm, we will have a traditional farmhouse lunch, and get a taste of Dutch hospitality.

After a lunch we will take you to heritage village of Zaanse Schans to see some traditional old Zaanse Houses (painted green). During our time in the village, we will visit one of the heritage windmills that’s still in use, to let you experience how they were used in the past.

What's included

Luxury transport form Amsterdam

Entrance to the dahlia gardens

Traditional Dutch farmhouse lunch

Entrance inside a heritage windmill

What's not included

Souvenirs

Gratuities

Additional information

Delve into the architectural wonders of Amsterdam's canal ring. Our expert-led tour explores centuries of architectural styles, from Renaissance to Baroque.

description:

About

On our pizza or burger cruise, you'll cruise through the Amsterdam canals while enjoying your favourite pizza or a delicious, homemade burger. We promise you, pizza and burgers really do taste better when you cruise the Amsterdam canals with your family or friends!

Everyone knows that pizza is one of the most popular dishes in the world. We serve different types of pizza like Margherita, Hawaï, Quatro Formaggi and Pepperoni. Make a choice before joining us on board. During the cruise, you will enjoy unlimited beer, wine and soft drinks.

If you're more into burgers, our homemade burgers are the perfect option for you. They are made from high-quality ingredients such as cheese, beef, tomatoes, lettuce, cucumber, and sauce and served on a fresh burger bun.

name: Amsterdam’s Ghostly Experiences
description:
GHOSTS OF AMSTERDAM

The dark history of almost 800 years hangs heavily over Amsterdam, and the past is lurking down every dark alley and street corner. Ancient souls wander Amsterdam’s many streets and buildings, endlessly searching, but for what? We do not know.

Bloody tales of murder, betrayal and even madness driven by love and jealousy flow through the many stories of troubled shadows that appear, mainly at night. Yet most locals will tell you they do not believe in ghosts…

EXPLORE DARK ALLEYS

With a lantern by their side, our guide will take you on a quest to uncover the darker side of Amsterdam as we hear tales full of darkness and treachery. On this fun tour, our guide will share some of the history of Amsterdam, along with some of the spookier stories from the city. Whilst the focus of this tour is very much on fun, our guide will share some of the darker tales of the city.

SEE THE CITY AT NIGHT

The city looks magical at night, with the lights on the bridges and reflections in the canals, so this tour isn't all darkness. Although, who knows who or what we may discover as we explore the city in the darkest depths of night? On these tours, the spirits have a way of making their presence felt…

Our tours in Amsterdam are small-scale and personal with a ma
highlights: Unique route with stories through the city.
Personal guide for 2 hours

name: Private Tour: Anne Frank’s Last Walk with VR Experience
description:
Anne Frank is Amsterdam’s most famous resident. Every year millions of people travel to Amsterdam to see where Anne and her family hid from the Nazis during WW2. In this tour, we will walk along the last part of the route Anne and her family took on their journey to their hiding place, and sadly their final home. Together, we will travel back in time to the Amsterdam of WWII and experience the emotion and hope of Anne Frank during the dark days of the war as her story unfolds.

As we walk around the local area we’ll see the famous Westerkerk, the outside of the house where Anne and her family were hiding for over 2 years and the beautiful Prinsengracht. Using Anne’s own words from her diary, we will learn about Anne, the ‘secret annex’, what she could see from her refuge and the influence her story has had on people in the Netherlands and the rest of the world.

Rather than a sombre story of loss and sorrow, this tour is also about tolerance and hope, because, as Anne wrote: "Don’t think of all the misery, but of all the beauty that still remains."

ANNE FRANK HOUSE IN VIRTUAL REALITY

We will finish our tour at a cafe near Anne Frank House. Here you will have a drink and then enter into the Secret Annex via the magic of a virtual reality recre
highlights: Unique route with stories through the city.
Private guide for 2 hours
Virtual Reality experience of Anne Frank House

name: Avondrondvaart Luxe Open Sloep - Inclusief Drankjes
description:
We starten bij het iconische Amsterdam Centraal Station en varen langs de imposante Sint Nicolaaskerk. Tijdens deze avondrondvaart geniet u van Amsterdam in zijn meest betoverende gloed: de historische gebouwen en charmante grachten worden prachtig verlicht, waardoor een magische sfeer ontstaat. Vervolgens passeren we de historische Schreierstoren en het indrukwekkende Scheepvaartmuseum. Daarna genieten we van de beroemde Dansende Huisjes voordat we de schilderachtige Amstel opvaren, waar de charme van de stad goed tot zijn recht komt in het zachte avondlicht.

Langs de Stopera en de statige Herengracht vervolgen we onze route naar het levendige Thorbeckeplein. We varen onder de beroemde Zeven Bruggen door en slaan af naar de Prinsengracht, waarna we het sfeervolle Amstelveld passeren. Een hoogtepunt van de tocht is de iconische Magere Brug, een van de meest romantische plekken van Amsterdam, waar de schitterende verlichting de brug een sprookjesachtig karakter geeft.

We eindigen bij de historische

name: Private Group Amsterdams City Highlights & Hidden Gems Walking Tour
description:
Canal District, Dam Square, Jordaan and more

One of the charms of Amsterdam is the ‘open-air’ museum feeling and there is a lot for your group to explore. We will show you the older parts of the city centre visiting the heart of the Amsterdam at the famous Dam Square where the city first begin. As the group explores the famous streets of Amsterdam, they'll walk by lanes lined with the famous canal houses that lean in all directions.

We will stroll through the quaint streets of the 17th-century canal district, crossing several picturesque bridges and see the houses of the rich merchants and traders. Just west of the canal district is the old working-class area called Jordaan, where you will see the house Anne Frank and her family hid in for over 2 years.

The final route of the tour is flexible and depends on the location where we will start. We always aim to view as many of the highlights of our city as possible, weather allowing

name: Anne Frank’s Amsterdam: Jewish History & WWII Private tour (ENGLISH)
description:
Anne Frank’s diary is one of the most powerful and enduring accounts of life under Nazi occupation, offering profound and deeply personal insights into the struggles of Jewish families during World War II. Her story has become a universal symbol of resilience and hope in the face of the horrors of the Holocaust.

On this private walking tour, our expert guide will take you on a journey through Amsterdam during World War II. Beginning your journey at Anne Frank’s House (exterior only), learn about her life, the persecution of the Jewish community, and the tragic deportations that sent over 100,000 Dutch Jews to concentration camps. As you explore the Jewish Quarter and Amsterdam’s historic streets and canals, uncover stories of resistance, the devastating impact of the Hunger Winter of 1944-45, and the city’s struggle under Nazi occupation.

This Anne Frank and Amsterdam during WWII tour offers a powerful and moving exploration of the city’s history, from the Holocaust in Ams
highlights:
Homomonument
Visit the first memorial in the world dedicated to persecuted LGBTQ+ individuals, commemorating those who lost their lives under the Nazi regime.
(10 minutes)

Deaf Memorial
A small but poignant monument honoring Jewish deaf and hard-of-hearing victims, labeled as “Untermenschen” by the Nazis and systematically murdered.
(10 minutes)

Anne Frank House (Exterior Only)
See where Anne and her family hid for two years during Nazi occupation. Hear the story of their time in hiding and the
betrayal that led to their tragic fate.

National Holocaust Names Monument
Pay tribute at this striking memorial, where over 102,000 names of Dutch Jewish victims are engraved—each representing a life lost during the Holocaust.

Portuguese Synagogue (Exterior Only)
Step into the Jewish Quarter and admire this stunning 17th-century landmark that remains one of the oldest functioning synagogues in Europe.

The Canals
Stroll along Amsterdam’s scenic canals, where historic facades, bridges, and houseboats provide a backdrop to stories of wartime survival, resistance, and loss.
Please arrive 10 minutes before the scheduled start time.
Your guide will be wearing a Babylon badge on a Babylon lanyard. They will also reach out to you on the morning of the tour to confirm the meeting point.

name: Free Tour Utrecht
description:
Adéntrate en el casco antiguo de Utrecht
Si existe una ciudad idílica, te decimos desde ya que es en Utrecht. Además de tener un ambiente superuniversitario y lleno de vida, Utrecht se caracteriza por custodiar todo lo auténtico y medieval. ¿Te animas a conocer con nosotros esta ciudad llamada por sí misma como el corazón de Holanda y descubrir todos sus secretos?

Durante este recorrido, revive los dos mil años de historia de sus canales, calles y puentes con uno de nuestros guías hispanohablantes. ¿Qué significó el famoso Tratado de Utrecht para España? ¿Cómo era la ciudad comercial más importante de los Países Bajos en la Edad Media?

Aunque la reserva para este tour es gratuita, al finalizar eres tú mismo quién valora el trabajo de los guías con una remuneración económica que tiene que ser tan buena como el tour que te han hecho. Aquí no hay trampa ni cartón.

Guía especializado (y muy simpático) de habla hispana.

name: Humans of Amsterdam - Cultural Walking Tour
description:
This is the tour where Amsterdam slowly stops feeling like a place you’re decoding and starts feeling like a city that’s letting you in.

You walk through beautiful neighbourhoods, sure — but you also sit down, talk, laugh, and meet real Amsterdammers who share their lives, not a script.

Somewhere between café stops, apple pie, honest questions, and stories about freedom, work, love, and contradictions, the city opens up in a very human way.

It’s not about ticking off sights; it’s about understanding how Amsterdam actually works — and leaving feeling like you didn’t just visit, but connected.

What's included

2 meet and greets with locals (the locals are paid for their time)

1 slice of Amsterdam's best apple pie

2 drinks of choice

High class storytelling

Our lifelong friendship

Itinerary

Stop 1 — Homomonument / Westerkerk
We kick off near the Anne Frank House and the worlds first gay monument

Embark on an journey through the iconic canals of Amsterdam with KINboat. Our cozy, covered boats, equipped with an onboard heating system, ensure a comfortable and warm experience as you cruise through the enchanting city, even in the chilly winters.

name: Canal Tour
description:
Hop aboard our public canal tour for a 90-minute adventure through Amsterdam's charming waterways. Our storytellers and captains, people with refugee backgrounds, will sail you through Amsterdam on a colorful wooden boat that once ferried refugees across the Mediterranean.

This isn't your typical canal tour, throughout the journey, you'll discover the enormous contributions by newcomers to Amsterdam's success throughout the centuries. Our guides will share their personal and unique life stories with you; some may make you laugh, and others may bring you to tears. Throughout the tour, there is space for meaningful conversation and interaction.

You will also learn about the journey of a fishing boat from Egypt, which was used by smugglers to transport dozens of people across the Mediterranean, and how two of these original refugee boats eventually found their way into the canals of Amsterdam.

The Lampedusa crew shows you another side of Amsterdam through their highly-rated and award-winning tours, often described by many as ‘one of their most meaningful experiences in the city.

What's included

Stories and beautiful views of Amsterdam

Stories of Amsterdam's immigrants, past and present

Space for questions and real interaction.

Life Jackets are also available on the boat!

With only 10 seats available, this intimate setting is perfect for photography lovers, content creators, and anyone looking to capture the ultimate Amsterdam moment.

Sail past iconic landmarks such as the Anne Frank House, charming canal houses, and picturesque bridges—all while surrounded by a breathtaking floral display. Whether you're a local or a visitor, this unique tour is the way to experience Amsterdam’s charm from the water. Don’t miss your chance to be part of this once-in-a-lifetime tulip experience! 🌷

Limited spots available – book now!

The tour is in English.

name: Guided Tour of Windmill De Adriaan
description:
Your stay in Haarlem would not be complete without a visit to the Adriaan windmill, a smock mill charmingly located in the city center on the banks of the river Spaarne. If there is a miller present, you will see the windmill in action. You can only visit the Adriaan under the supervision of one of the guides.

Please contact us (minimum 48 hours) if you require special assistance for the guided tour or have time constraints. Consider the Private Group option.

Itinerary

The tour begins by taking you through two floors with beautiful detailed models of different types of windmills. On the basis of these models, the guide will give you a clear explanation of the history and operation of windmills in the Netherlands.

Then the tour goes to the top floor, the milling floor with the pair of special grinding millstones that mill the grain into flour. The floor below the milling floor is where the flour is collected and bagged. On this floor you can also go outside and walk around the gallery, which at 12 meters (40 feet) high gives you a beautiful view of the city of Haarlem and the river Spaarne.

If you also want to see De Adriaan and Haarlem from a boat thru the canals and river Spaarne, several operators offer canal tours varying from 50-180

Children (5-12 years) €3,50

Molen De Adriaan (Windmill): Papentorenvest 1A, 2011 AV Haarlem between Catherijne Brug and DeKoepel (Open Campus | Haarlem University).

name: Shared Amsterdam Light Festival Cruise
description:
Experience the enchantment of the Amsterdam Light Festival on an electric boat cruise with beer, wine, glühwein, hot chocolate, and soda. Embark on a journey of wonder and illumination while under warm blankets. Learn about the history of the canals and facts about the city.

Settle into the luxurious comfort of a modern, fully electric boat, designed to shield you from the elements, and set out on a cruise through the vibrant heart of Amsterdam. As twilight descends, pass by a captivating gallery of 20 luminous art installations that adorn the canals.

Wrapped in warmth with provided blankets, immerse yourself in the city's beauty and allure from the cozy haven of your boat. Listen to stories shared by your skipper or host.

Delve into the stories behind the art pieces, explore the rich history of the canals, and uncover insights about the city itself. All the while, indulge in a selection of alcoholic and non-alcoholic beverages, generously provided without limit from the onboard bar.

The thirteenth edition of Amsterdam Light Festival takes place from 27 November 2025 until 18 January 2026.

What's included
Cruise by electric boat

Unlimited beer, glühwein, hot chocolate, and soft drinks

Our Amsterdam tour is an adventure you don't want to miss! Hop aboard our stunning, large luxury sloop with enough space for everyone, and prepare to discover the city like a true explorer. Enjoy unlimited drinks and mouth-watering Dutch snacks as we take you to one of Amsterdam's best boat catering to pick up authentic Amsterdam 'bitterballen' - a must-try Dutch snack!

La visita al paese dei mulini a vento Zaanse Schans è da non perdere quando visiti Amsterdam. Comprando questa visita puoi anche scegliere di visitare le LEGO HOUSE di Zaandam. Questa luogo non è incluso nelle 4 ore di visita con la guida ma puoi chiedere alla guida come fare per vederle senza costi aggiuntivi.

INSOLITAMSTERDAM è consigliata come migliore guida italiana di Amsterdam sulla guida Marco Polo.

name: Luxury E-tender Rental
description:
Boat rental of a luxury boat. This boat is electric, has a sundeck and is very comfortable.

You can sail the "Ronde Hoep" to Uithoorn and visit the lovely terrassen or sail to the Vinkeveense plassen and swim or sun bade on one of the numerous little Islands. You can also sail to Amsterdam. Note: On a beautiful Saturday you are not the only one with this great idea. It could be quite a challenge to navigate the Canals with all the big tourist canal boats. Some experience is required to sail the canal belt district or het "IJ" .

You can bring a bluetooth speaker or ask us to bring you one. But note! People living on the Amstel river as well as Amsterdam, are not amused by loud people sailing by. Please make sure everybody enjoys the day!

What's included

Comfortable seats for aprox 8 people, Sundeck, Swim ladder, Cooler box, Cushions, Bluetooth Speaker (asks us to bring one), little bin

What's not included

name: (Exclusive) Hidden Gems Tour
description:
Your guests will discover the hidden Amsterdammers who made this city special!
About

Forget the canals - Amsterdam is a city built on stories! Stroll through the busy Jewish Quarter and spacious Plantage neighborhood and get a cross-section of the city's BIPOC, LGBTQ+, Jewish and women's history.

Highlights include:

The Artist's Resistance Monument and the badass author in the Canon van Nederland
The Portuguese Synagogue and the woman who revolutionized Amsterdam without seeing it
The hidden plaque and the woman who combined art and biology

The tour ends at the H'ART Museum. If your guests are coming by bike, a good place to park is near the Blauwbrug.

Cancellations

name: (Exclusive) LGBTQ+ History Tour
description:
Your guests will explore LGBTQ+ history through the stories of the people who lived it
About

LGBTQ+ people have played an important role in the development of the city and guided it towards the beacon it became. Their stories give a sense of the full breadth of LGBTQ+ history in Amsterdam.

Highlights include:

The remains of the city theater and a classical lesbian love triangle
The first drag bar and one of its international stars
The forgotten city tower and a trans man in Amsterdam's army

The tour ends on the Torensluis. If your guests are coming by bike, a good place to park is near the Munttoren.

Cancellations

name: (Exclusive) Shifting the Frame: a Rijksmuseum guided tour
description:
Your guests see where the Dutch Masters take a backseat to the Dutch badasses
About

Amsterdam’s world-famous Rijksmuseum has it all: Rembrandt, Van Gogh, Vermeer, Frans Hals. It also has some incredible female, LGBTQ+, Jewish, and BIPOC badasses hiding in plain sight. This tour encompasses both.

Our (wheelchair accessible) tour explores the Rijksmuseum with a modern lens. The museum was built as a temple to Dutch history in the 19th century, but our understanding of that history has expanded since then. This tour explores the full breadth of Dutch and Amsterdam history, both the traditional figures and those often overlooked or misunderstood.

See the famous Dutch artists in a new light while also taking in some truly astounding works created by - and showcasing – the stories of women, LGBTQ+, Jewish, and BIPOC people in the Netherlands and beyond.

Badass Tours co-created this tour with artist, Rijksmuseum guide and art history obsessive Tanja Bladt-Cohen, who leads most of our Shifting the Frame tours!

Rijksmuseum tickets are included in the price.

Cancellations

name: (Exclusive) Customized Walking Tour
description:
About

Your guests get a personalized tour that covers the interests they’re curious about and the neighborhoods they want to see. Choose the preferred pick-up / drop-off locations and any combination of our hidden history themes. We can focus specific types of badasses, such as artists, politicians, and rebels. Or perhaps they want something related to a specific industry, such as entertainment, finance, business leadership, or architecture.

Cancellation Policy

Our customized tours feature stories and locations that aren't on our other tours. Preparing these and crafting a new route involve a significant investment of time. As such, €100 of the cost is not refundable.

Cancellations

name: THE DUTCH EXPERIENCE: Food and Drink tour
description:
On this Classic Dutch tour, we'll stroll through Amsterdam hitting all our favorite and best locations to get traditional Dutch snacks and drinks. There will be 7 stops in total — mostly food but also a stopover at the best bar for top-quality Dutch beer and jenever.

A very common question is: "What is Dutch food?" The simple answer: they eat a bit of sweet, a bit of savory, and of course, anything deep-fried served with beer. Together we’ll explore a variety of well-known and lesser known Dutch foods, snacks and drinks.

Come hungry — leave satisfied.

Embark on an exhilarating Private E-Bike tour of Amsterdam, where you'll explore the city's most beautiful and intriguing landmarks, all while enjoying the comfort and convenience of an electric bike.
Glide through the streets effortlessly as your well-seasoned guide shares captivating stories about Amsterdam's rich and peculiar history, along with their own unique observations and opinions. name: TopDeck's Amsterdam Bike Tour B
description:
As you ride with our guide on our TopDeck Amsterdam Bike Tour you will discover the highlights of the city on a fun 2 hour bike ride. Be ready for some cycling and a lot of laughs.

Over the course of 2 hours we’ll take you through some of the most beautiful streets of Amsterdam. We’ll encounter many of the highlights of the city, including the Anne Frank House, Rijksmuseum, and an old city gate, as we pass over picturesque canals and drawbridges. Whilst you cycle, you'll hear all about Amsterdam's rich and diverse history as well as the quirks and peculiarities that make up Amsterdam's culture and society.

Along with the history, you'll hear the personal stories, observations, and opinions of your local guide. All of our guides are personable, knowledgeable, and above all, fun!

We always have your safety in mind, so you can enjoy your bike ride responsibly.

Highlights
Ride along Amsterdam's Canals
Cross historic drawbridges through the city centre
Pass beautiful canal houses
Go through the lovely, green Vondelpark
Cycle under the Rijksmuseum, The Netherlands national art museum through an amazing tunnel,
See a centuries-old city gate just outside the Red Light District
Cancellations

name: The Original Brews & Tales - Amsterdam Craft Beer Tour
description:
Discover the Tastiest Craft Beers in Amsterdam!
Are you ready to dive into the world of award-winning and distinctive craft beers from some of the Netherlands' top microbreweries?
This isn’t just beer you can pick up anywhere, this is a journey through the heart of the Netherland’s craft beer scene, where every sip tells a story

Sip, Savour, and Explore:
The Ultimate Craft Beer Adventure in Amsterdam!
Thirsty for adventure? Get ready to embark on a delicious journey through Amsterdam’s craft beer wonderland! We’re talking about sipping on liquid gold from the finest microbreweries in the Netherlands, beers so unique and tasty, they’ll make your taste buds dance in delight.

Hoppy, Happy, and Ready to Discover?
Whether you’re a hops enthusiast, a stout lover, or just dipping your toes into the beer world, we’ve got the perfect brew for you. From IPAs that pack a punch to Trappist ales that are the stuff of legend, this tour is your ticket to beer bliss. Expect bold and subtle flavours, award-winning brews, and a whole lot of “Hops hops hurray!”

Craft Beer, Cozy Vibes, and a Dash of Dutch Charm

description:
Your guests will meet Jewish Amsterdammers from across four centuries!
About

In the 1590s, Jewish Amsterdammers began building a community in the relative safety of the city that transformed both the Netherlands and the world. Your guests will learn about these creative, compassionate, and challenging mavericks and their lasting impact.

Highlights include:

The diamond factory and the union that revolutionized Dutch working conditions
The hidden church and the world-renowned philosopher who lived there first
The towering theater and the comedienne with the enormous legacy

name: (Exclusive) Women's History Tour
description:
Your guests will meet the women who shaped and were shaped by this amazing city!
About

We walk through Amsterdam's historic center, uncovering stories of badass women hidden in plain sight.

Highlights include:

The city bank and the first Black female millionaire in the Americas
The VOC and the Indonesian feminist whose legacy continues to be fought over
The hidden courtyard and the women who practiced creative defiance

The tour ends at the Spui. If your guests are coming by bike, a good place to park is the Upper Rokin.

Cancellations
highlights: The city bank and the first Black female millionaire in the Americas
The VOC and the Indonesian feminist whose legacy continues to be fought over
The hidden courtyard and the women who practiced creative defiance

name: (Exclusive) Highlights of Amsterdam Tour
description:
Your guests will get the best of Amsterdam and the secret stories most guides miss
About

Dam Square? Check!
Westerkerk? Check!
Grachtengordel? Jordaan? Rembrandt? Check! Check! Check!

We’ll also throw in some stories of historical Amsterdam
badasses that we think everyone should know.

The tour ends at Westerkerk. If your guests are coming by bike, a good place to park on Raadhuisstraat.

Cancellations

name: (Exclusive) Immigration Nation Tour
description:
Amsterdam’s Immigrants: They got the job done.
About

Amsterdam is a city built by immigrants, so why not take in the entire sweep of the city’s 750-year history by following the stories of its pioneers and world-travelers? This tour also takes you through some of the highlights and secret treasures of central Amsterdam.

The tour ends on Oosterdok in front of OBA (the public library). If your guests are coming by bike, a good place to park is at Nieuwmarkt.

Cancellations

name: Diamond Experience Tour
description:
Enjoy the beauty of diamonds in an intimate setting during this private version of our most popular tour. Guided in your own language, this 45-minute experience takes you inside the world’s oldest operating diamond polishing factory, right at the Museum Square.

See our master polishers and goldsmiths at work, and gain insight into the craft of diamond cutting. Admire the Koh-i-Noor replica, repolished by Royal Coster for Queen Victoria, and get an exclusive introduction to the Royal 201: our signature cut and the most sparkling round cut natural diamond in the world.

Whether you are exploring alone, as a couple, or with family, this personalised tour is the perfect way to enjoy the brilliance of Royal Coster at your own pace.

What's included
Private tour
Guided in your own language
Live craftsmanship
Koh-i-Noor replica
Royal 201 introduction
Tax-free shopping
Cancellations

description:
Ervaar de schoonheid van Amsterdam vanaf het water met de grachtentocht van KINboat. Vaar langs de historische grachten en passeer iconische bezienswaardigheden zoals het Anne Frank Huis, de Westerkerk en de pittoreske Magere Brug. Ga met ons mee op een één uur durende reis door het hart van de stad, vol rijke geschiedenis en fascinerende uitzichten.

name: Amsterdam Light Festival Rondvaart in overdekte sloep inclusief drankjes
description:
Stap aan boord met KINboat voor een unieke ervaring tijdens de veertiende editie van het Amsterdam Light Festival, met als thema "Legacy." Van 27 november 2025 tot 18 januari 2026, verlichten prachtige lichtkunstwerken de grachten van Amsterdam. Dit jaar is er extra geïnvesteerd in de kunstwerken, wat zorgt voor nog indrukwekkendere installaties.

Onze 75-minuten durende rondvaart vertrekt dagelijks vanaf het Centraal Station. Aan boord geniet je van warme/koude drankjes en leer je van onze deskundige gidsen meer over de betekenis van elk kunstwerk. KINboat biedt comfortabele dekens en een intieme setting, zodat je optimaal kunt genieten van het uitzicht op deze bijzondere lichtkunstwerken.
