Bezoek het Diamant Museum Amsterdam en beleef een diamantroof in onze Laser Room!
Looptijd

1 uur

Omschrijving

Het Diamant Museum is een must voor iedereen die geïnteresseerd is in diamanten en juwelen. Laat u betoveren door glinsterende edelstenen en beleef 400 jaar diamant geschiedenis in het enige diamant museum in Europa. U wordt meegenomen op een reis die honderden kilometers onder het aardoppervlak begon en eindigt in de ring aan uw vinger.
Het Diamant Museum heeft een unieke permanente collectie met beroemde stukken zoals het Katana zwaard (Japans) van Murano glas met 1067 diamanten en 494 robijnen, de kleinste diamant ooit geslepen door Pauline Willemse, en de Apen schedel met diamanten. Deze schedel bevat 17.000 schitterende diamanten en is geïnspireerd op de met diamanten ingelegde menselijke schedel van Damien Hirst. Gezinnen en kinderen kunnen het museum ontdekken met een spannende speurtocht (te koop bij de kassa van het museum) of beleef een spectaculaire diamantroof in onze nieuwe Laser Room.

The Diamond Heist
De deur gaat open en je loopt een donkere kamer in. Aan de andere kant van de kamer zie je de grootste diamant die je ooit hebt gezien. De lasers gaan aan en de kamer vult zich met rook.
Je missie? Pak de diamant…….
Bezoek nu het Diamant Museum Amsterdam en b

name: Private Day Trip to Zaanse Schans Windmills, Edam, Volendam y Marken
description:
Duración

8 Horas

Acerca

Combina de manera más exclusiva la visita a los molinos de Zaanse Schans con el increíble casco histórico de la localidad de Edam y los preciosos pueblos pesqueros de Volendam y Marken.

Zaanse Schaans es un museo al aire libre. Representa un pueblo tradicional, con sus molinos de viento históricos y casas de madera. Dentro de uno de los molinos de viento se llega a conocer su historia y cómo este lugar se convirtió en un lugar estratégico.

Conoceremos Edam, ciudad Patrimonio de la Humanidad desde 1996. Desde el S. XVI Edam se convirtió en una de las ciudades portuarias más importantes del norte de Holanda, aunque su renombre mundial se debe al “mercado de quesos” que aún se sigue realizando en los meses de verano. Haremos una parada en una granja, donde nos mostrarán cómo se elabora de manera artesanal el queso holandés.

A continuación, nos dirigimos a Volendam a través de los polders, lugares donde se asienta la ganadería y la agricultura del país. En Volendam, localidad pesquera, podremos hacernos una foto con los atuendos típicos o probar algunos de los pesca

description:
Experience a small-group, all-inclusive spring tour to see hyacinths, daffodils and tulips in bloom for a limited seven-week season. Your guide takes you to locations larger tour buses cannot reach, offering a more intimate visit and the chance to walk through a working tulip farmer’s fields. Best viewing is mid-March to late April, with peak field visits recommended from 7 to 30 April. Morning and afternoon departures are available to fit your schedule.

name: Dominatrix
description:
Our Amsterdam pain game is based upon the simple premise that the stag is guilty of having become engaged. This disgraceful Faux Pas is an odious betrayal of the boys, who are obviously the only proper recipients of the stag’s loyalty and affection. This heinous treason must be punished, but how? If we’re honest, most of us lack the resources to launch a full scale reprisal to the insult that is one of our friends getting married. Feeling frustrated by the stag’s smug “happily ever after” attitude, but unable to take vengeance on a scale that seems appropriate? FunAmsterdam has you covered. Our pain game is all about punishment.

Cancellations

name: Highlights Bike Tour
description:
Discover all the highlights of Amsterdam in 2.5 hours
Duration

2.5 hours

About

Start your Amsterdam tour by jumping on board a bicycle and traveling like the locals do. On this quirky Amsterdam bike tour you will use the city’s most beloved form of transportation and hear stories and tales from the city’s past and present. You’ll feel like a true Amsterdammer in no time.

Weave your way through Amsterdam’s history by starting downtown. See all the major highlights as you learn about Amsterdam's rich history. Cycle over bridges, along idyllic canals, and into hidden courtyards. You will have plenty of opportunities to stop and photograph the picturesque city.

At each stop your guide will tell you about the history of the sites that you’re visiting and also about Amsterdam's culture.

Cancellations

name: Highlights Bike- and boat tour
description:
Experience the beauty of Amsterdam like never before with our exclusive combo package. A thrilling combination of a bike and boat tour, the package offers you the opportunity to explore Amsterdam from two unique perspectives - on the canals and on the bike lanes.

Our highlights tour is the perfect start to your adventure. Led by one of our friendly and knowledgeable tour guides, you'll discover the most iconic landmarks of Amsterdam. From the charming and historic canals to the famous and bustling Dam Square, our tour is an excellent introduction to the city.

But that's not all - the fun continues with the Captain Jack Amsterdam boat tour! You'll receive a voucher in your confirmation email, which can be used to reserve your spot on the boat tour. This gives you the freedom to plan your tour around your schedule and choose the day and time that works best for you. On the boat tour, you'll witness Amsterdam from a unique and unforgettable vantage point, taking in the city's captivating scenery and enjoying its rich cultural heritage. Drinks and bites are included on the boat tour.

How to book the combination package?

The combination package gives you a discounted price for the bike tour and the boat tour.
From this page you can select the desired timeslot for the highlights bike tour.
After booking you will receive a link and codes to book your timeslot for the boat tour.
This way you have the freedom to choose any time slot you'd like.

name: Countryside Bike- and boat tour
description:
Immerse yourself in the unparalleled beauty of Amsterdam like never before with our unbeatable combo package! This package is a perfect blend of adventure and relaxation, allowing you to explore Amsterdam from two completely different perspectives - on the enchanting canals and on the captivating countryside. By opting for this package, you'll get the best of both worlds, and create everlasting memories of your journey.

Ride along the Amstel River towards the Dutch polder landscape on our Countryside Bike tour. Meet an eccentric farmer at his clog factory and cheese farm, taste some free samples of authentic Dutch cheese, and visit an authentic windmill. See the community of houseboats that was once a hippie community and now loved by wealthier classes.

Moreover, you will get a chance to experience the Captain Jack Amsterdam boat tour! A voucher will be sent to your email for your convenience to reserve your seat for the tour. With the flexibility to select a time and day that works best for you, it's easier to plan your tour. Witness the stunning views of Amsterdam from a unique perspective on the boat tour and enjoy the city's culture and scenery. Drinks and bites are included during the boat tour.

How to book the combination package?

The combination package gives you a discounted price for the bike tour and the boat tour.
From this page you can sele

name: Van Gogh Museum Small Group Tour
description:
Discover one of the most famous and influential painters in the history of art.

Follow Vincent’s story with your guide in our Van Gogh Museum Small Group Tour (max 8 people). You will get a nice introduction to one of our beloved Dutch Masters.

Discover the Sunflowers and the genius of Vincent van Gogh.

Van Gogh is the quintessential misunderstood genius. He was considered a madman and a failure while he was alive, but attained widespread artistic and commercial success in the decades following his death. You’ll be using both your ears to listen to engaging stories about his life and artwork as you explore the museum.

More than just a tour of his masterpieces, in this tour you will learn more about Van Gogh as a person. How did he start his painting career? How was his relationship with his family? As your guide takes you through the museum, they will provide the stories behind the paintings that go much deeper than the descriptions on the wall.

Sunflowers and Potato Eaters

Find out what inspired Vincent’s artwork, from his famous Sunflowers, his intimate self-portraits, and beautiful Blossom Trees.

On this tour, you will follow Vincent’s story from his humble upbringing, his decision to take up the brush, his unrecognised genius, to eventually his most productive times and his tragic death. Why is his art so
highlights: Ticket to the Van Gogh Museum

name: Keukenhof, Tulip Farm, Flower Fields & Delft City
description:
Keukenhof, Tulip Farm, Flower Fields & Delft City

This wonderful seasonal tour covers two magnificent Dutch highlights in one day! Wander through the world’s largest flower garden the ‘Keukenhof’ and surround yourself in old world charm as you walk with your guide through the cobblestone streets of historic Delft.

Price

1 Person (Ages 7+) €540
2 People (Ages 7+) €590
3 People (Ages 7+) €660
4 People (Ages 7+) €690
5 People (Ages 7+) €740
6 People (Ages 7+) €790

Tour duration

7 hours

Keukenhof

The Keukenhof is world renowned and the largest flower park in the world. Enjoy dazzling displays of tulips, hyacinths, daffodils, orchids, roses, carnations, irises, lilies and many other flowers. This incredible flower extravaganza attracts visitors from all over the globe.

Delft

Get a taste of old-world charm as you wander around historic Delft. Walk with your guide through cobblestone streets lined with quaint houses, canals, and historic churches. Picture perfect Delft is known for the painter Johannes Vermeer, William of Orange and last but not least Delft's world famous earthenware 'Delft Blue'.

Meet & Connect 

All our tours begin with getting to know our guests and understanding their wishes. The itinerary is flexible and we can add special requests and will not rush you around. Starting from your hotel or vacation address, your private guide will pick you up with our comfortable car to start this beautiful day.

description:

Overview:
On this historic walking tour we'll learn about the stories and events that shaped the city's unique character. We’ll delve into the humble beginning of the city, explore 'old Amsterdam,' embark on a historical voyage with the VOC, and uncover the city's progressive past. Discovering hidden gems, we’ll stroll along some of Amsterdam's 100 km of canals, and cover the story of one of the most well-known figures from history, Anne Frank.

This tour provides a comprehensive overview of Amsterdam's rich history, from its humble beginnings to its role as a global trade hub and its enduring legacy as a city of freedom and culture.

name: Day Tour to Köln from Amsterdam
description:
Set off on an exciting journey that begins and ends in Amsterdam, taking you to one of Europe’s most captivating cities: Cologne. This unique tour blends history, culture, and stunning architecture into a single unforgettable day.

Your first destination is Cologne, one of Germany’s oldest cities, nestled on the banks of the Rhine. Behold the majestic Kölner Dom, a UNESCO World Heritage Site and one of Europe’s finest examples of Gothic architecture. Explore the Old Town, where cobblestone streets and historic façades transport you back in time. Don’t miss the impressive St. Martin’s Church, a beautiful Romanesque landmark. Then, take a scenic walk across the Hohenzollern Bridge, famous for its love locks and panoramic views of the cathedral and the river. Before continuing your journey, enjoy free time in Freedom Square, where you can sample local delicacies or simply soak up the vibrant atmosphere.

After a day filled with remarkable sights and cultural richness, return to Amsterdam with unforgettable memories of your journey through Germany.

What's included
Round-trip transportation by bus from Amsterdam.
Bilingual professional guide.
What's not included
Lunch
Hotel Pick up and Drop off

description:
Discover Amsterdam from two perspectives with this combination ticket: a scenic canal cruise and entry to the Rembrandt House Museum.

Start your experience on the water with a relaxing 1-hour open boat cruise through the city’s historic canals. Sail past iconic sights and enjoy the atmosphere of Amsterdam from a comfortable Flagship boat, with live commentary from your skipper and host. Drinks are available for purchase on board.

After your cruise, head to the Rembrandt House Museum, located in the original 17th-century townhouse where the artist lived and worked for nearly 20 years. With a multimedia guide, explore Rembrandt’s studio, view his etchings and drawings, and get an authentic impression of his daily life and creative process.

This combination offers the perfect mix of culture and relaxation: experience Amsterdam’s charm from

description:
Vincent Van Gogh wasn’t shy about indulging in a few dark pleasures, and after this tour, you’ll understand why. We will trace some of those vices in an engaging and – hopefully – dignified manner on this 5 to 5.5 hour, semi-private tour. Skip the line with our guides who will provide tickets that are valid for the whole day. We designed this tour for first-time visitors to learn about the relationship between the artist and Amsterdam’s iconic Red Light District, a relationship that resulted in Van Gogh painting a few scandalous works of art.

You’ve probably heard about one of the world’s most famous painters, Vincent Van Gogh. But what do you actually know about this Dutch artist? We’ll introduce you to the man behind the famous sunflowers and self-portraits on this intimate, small group tour. Learn about him through his iconic paintings of people eating potatoes and of his own bedroom, or maybe his “Wheat field with Crows” or “Yellow House.” We will visit the world’s largest collection of Van Gogh’s works to learn about his turbulent life stretching from his days in Holland to his dramatic ending in France. And yes, don’t worry, we’ll discuss that whole ear incident.

Then after a break for lunch, we’ll keep it as dignified and serious as possible as we discuss the legal drug vendors, the leather neighborhood, and the smoky “coffee shops” that attract people from around the world. Cast away your guilt and judgement, and let’s discuss the etiquette and laws that will allow you to appreciate this district to its fullest after the tour. Our professional guides will lead you through the salacious streets and coffee shops of the Red Light District, following in the footsteps of Van Gogh himself.

Cancellations

Historic Bruges is one of Europe's most charming cities!
Duration

11 Hours

About

History
Historic Bruges is one of Europe's most charming cities. Bruges has most of its medieval architecture intact, making it one of the most well-preserved medieval towns in Europe. Packed with picturesque alleys and ancient churches, the entire medieval city center is a UNESCO World Heritage site since 2000.

More…

Bruges is forever in competition with Amsterdam and Stockholm for the title of the '' Venice of the North '', as there are so many opulent mansions and characteristic old houses located along its canals. Explore the city from the water on a canal cruise or get the 13th-century feeling while wandering around in the historical city center.

Bruges is also well known for its local beers, lace and chocolate making, all of which you can enjoy in numerous inns and artisanal shops.

By private Minivan or Minibus

You will drive to Bruges with a comfortable Mercedes Benz minivan up to 7 people or a Mercedes Benz Minibus up to 19 people.

Our vehicles are equipped with any comfort as air conditioning, tinted windows, USB phone connections and free bottles of water for the passengers.

name: Shared Off The Beaten Path, Hidden Gems Canal Cruise
description:
Drift different through Amsterdam's hidden canals with local captains who were born here. While other boats pack 50+ people with megaphones, we keep it small and real. Your captains Jannah & Beer know which bridge lights up best, where locals drink coffee, and have real stories from growing up on these waters.

We skip tourist traps for secret spots where Amsterdam actually lives. You'll see quiet canals, local hangouts, and hidden corners that even many locals forget exist. This isn't a museum boat - it's like floating through Amsterdam in your friend's living room.

Come as you are, kick off shoes, grab blankets, and help yourself to drinks. Amsterdam moves fast. We move at water speed. No rush, no stress - just good people, calm water, and authentic connections. Small groups mean you can actually chat and ask questions.

No fixed script, no Heineken hats, no loud music. Just effortless vibes that feel cool without trying too hard. You'll get a Polaroid and our insider map to remember floating through Amsterdam like locals do. Perfect for conscious travelers who want authenticity over luxury.
Welcome aboard. Or as we like to say, welcome home!

What's included
90-minute shared canal cruise
Small group experience (max 6

name: Improv Spectacular | The Famous Boom Chicago Comedy Show
description:
Enjoy 30 years of Boom comedy innovation in one show! This fast-paced funny night features our top cast making you (and themselves) laugh while waiters bring drinks to your table. The evening starts with short-form improv and games with rules, bells, and lots of audience suggestions. We need a job and a movie-style! Ding. Let’s go!

Then after a break, our long-form improvisation creates a whole new world of characters, scenes, and funny situations based on stories inspired by just one word. You will be amazed! After the show, on many nights we present a free third act where we test new material for our new show. Bring your friends and enjoy a great night at Boom Chicago! Ding ding ding!

Cancellations

name: Tour em Português pelo Centro Histórico de Amsterdam | Dam, Bairro Judeu e Mercado das Flores
description:
Você sabia que essa cidade europeia começou sendo um pequeno povoado de pescadores nas margens do rio Amstel e hoje em dia é uma das mais importantes cidades comerciais da Europa?

Começaremos caminhando pelo centro histórico e chegaremos à Praça Dam, onde faremos uma introdução da história de Amsterdam e dos vários acontecimentos históricos que presenciou, desde o domínio espanhol, passando pelo francês e, mais tarde, pelo alemão.

Também passaremos pelo bairro judeu da cidade, o Museu Rembrandt e o Mercado Waterlooplein, o maior e mais antigo mercado das pulgas da cidade. Artesanato, roupas, lembranças e muito mais. Você vai resistir?

Além da parte histórica, também veremos mais sobre o dia-a-dia dos moradores da cidade passeando pelo Mercado das Flores, um dos lugares mais icônicos de Amsterdam.

Finalmente, iremos à loja Cheese & More Flower Market para fazer uma degustação de queijos holandeses. O final perfeito para o tour!

O que está incluído

Guia de língua portuguesa.
Degustação de queijos típicos holandeses.
